payload.title: Finalize AVG zero-investment go-to-market
payload.prompt: The PRE-3 analysis is complete. To lock the go-to-market, confirm these 3 founder decisions:

options.label: Accept recommended defaults
options.description: Niche: job-seeker/tech-creator shorts; floor INR 499/video, cap 20 videos/wk; use AVG publicly as Prem Autonomous Co demo.

options.label: I will specify different answers
options.description: Founder will supply niche, price floor/capacity, and public-demo yes/no.

questions.label: Target niche for Path A (done-for-you service)
questions.placeholder: e.g. local businesses / edu / job-seekers / tech creators

questions.label: OK to use AVG publicly as the Prem Autonomous Co demo (Path D)?
